name: Gotenberg
tagline: Gotenberg is a Docker-powered stateless API for PDF files.
description:
Gotenberg is a Docker-powered stateless API for PDF files.

Docs: https://gotenberg.dev/docs/getting-started/introduction?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  gotenberg:
    image: gotenberg/gotenberg:latest
    environment:
      - GOTENBERG_API_BASIC_AUTH_USERNAME=ub07ab40016
      - GOTENBERG_API_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD=972b7b4ba94588c2f1ee9ba04f5b3065
    command:
      - gotenberg
      - --api-enable-basic-auth
      - --api-disable-health-check-logging
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:3000/health
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42046:3000
